# Woof-Fit — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Woof-Fit is a premium dog-human fitness and bonding brand founded by Sarit Netanel, a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer. The brand occupies a unique niche — not dog training, not solo human fitness — but a guided workout series where owner and dog train simultaneously, building fitness, focus, confidence, and a deeper bond through shared movement. The brand voice is warm, expert, approachable, and slightly playful, with a Peloton-meets-sun-drenched-park-weekend aesthetic. The tagline 'Train Together. Bond Forever.' is sacred and never modified. Visual identity leans into golden-hour outdoor lifestyle photography featuring athletic dog breeds and relatable humans aged 25–55, with a warm earthy color palette and the 🐾 paw print used sparingly as a brand signature.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover the premier health and fitness experience where you and your dog train together. Build strength, confidence, and an unbreakable bond through guided, joyful workouts.

### About Woof-Fit
https://example.com/about
Learn how founder Sarit Netanel blends certified personal training with canine fitness expertise to help you evolve health and fitness as a team. Real connection starts here.

### Programs
https://example.com/programs
Explore signature programs designed for every fitness level, from high-energy interval sessions to mindful movement. Your premier health and fitness journey together begins now.

### Contact Us
https://example.com/contact
Ready to transform your fitness routine into a two-species adventure? Reach out today and let Woof-Fit help you evolve health and fitness, one paw step at a time.

### Thank You | Woof-Fit
https://example.com/thank-you
Woof-Fit - Thank You | Woof-Fit

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Woof-Fit
Woof-Fit is a premium dog-human fitness and bonding brand founded by Sarit Netanel, a Certified Personal Trainer and Certified Canine Fitness Trainer. The brand occupies a unique niche — not dog training, not solo human fitness — but a guided workout series where owner and dog train simultaneously, building fitness, focus, confidence, and a deeper bond through shared movement. The brand voice is warm, expert, approachable, and slightly playful, with a Peloton-meets-sun-drenched-park-weekend aesthetic. The tagline 'Train Together. Bond Forever.' is sacred and never modified. Visual identity leans into golden-hour outdoor lifestyle photography featuring athletic dog breeds and relatable humans aged 25–55, with a warm earthy color palette and the 🐾 paw print used sparingly as a brand signature.

## Target Audience
- Dog owners aged 25–55 who want to exercise with their dogs, build a stronger bond, and add enrichment beyond regular walks — beginners welcome, no fitness background required
- Dog Fitness Enthusiasts
- Pet Wellness Advocates
- New Pet Parents

## Industry
Health & Fitness

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
